title: pelargonium × rhodolentum
intro: Pelargonium × rhodolentum, also known as the Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Rose Geranium include essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to promote overall well-being.
